sections: HCM-0.6 exact shipped kind and root-profile data
HCM-1.4 profile-aware setup and doctor decision proof gate
Round-1 admission blocker and exact subject contract

repo_truth: Review 1 agent /root/hcm_1_4_impl_review_1 returned BLOCKED at admission because its own dispatch was staged, making 28 paths. The parent unstaged only that immutable dispatch; no implementation or proof byte changed. The current index now contains exactly the 27 bound subject paths: 25 canonical-LF manifested files plus deletion of crates/compiler/src/doctor_shell.rs and crates/compiler/src/setup_shell.rs. Both review dispatches are untracked read-only evidence and excluded from the staged implementation subject. Independently perform the complete semantic review; inherit no approval.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only; replay all 25 manifest hashes/aggregate, exactly two named deletions, exactly 27 staged paths, and zero unstaged tracked bytes.
Review every staged production, test, proof, and control-pack byte against the full HCM-1.4 packet and unchanged authority.
Run bounded read-only Rust, Git, API, security, mutation, portability, package, scope, GitNexus, and validator checks as needed.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence and smallest in-scope remediation.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, dispatch/handoff/ledger writes, or user task hops.
No condition evaluator/evidence, canonical content/materialization, semantic validation, intake, renderer/Projection, SDK, publication, flow/pipeline, HCM-2+, or adjacent cleanup.
No compatibility bridge, new profile flag/command, transactional reset repair, broader authoring change, or compiler package claim.
Do not treat parent proof, planning CLEAN, or Review 1 admission validation as implementation approval.
tasks: Invoke required skills, replay subject admission exactly, and return BLOCKED if any byte/count differs.
Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order with exact evidence, gate, failure, smallest remediation, and invalidated proof.
Audit decision/condition binding, evidence-input absence, ordering, custom data, and no fixed/ambient universe.
Audit bounded strict no-follow inspection, aggregate accounting, duplicate YAML, exact status/reason mapping, structural routing, determinism, race safety, and disclosure bounds.
Audit setup/doctor public contracts, shared closure, status/error totality, no artifact write, rewrite/preflight mutation ordering, injected/default equality, and reset failure honesty.
Audit CLI-only wording/JSON/exit, exact wire values/LF, unchanged grammar/discovery, and no profile/condition input.
Audit the exact author portability hunk and two authorized fixture helpers against helper/unlock behavior and the complete 47/22 suites.
Verify focused/full Unix, actual Windows runtime, package/extraction, compiler source-tree, Cargo equality, fixed-symbol/input absence, scope, secrets, whitespace, handoff, and staged GitNexus proof.
Verify test disposition and control-pack/proof truth supports only BoundaryLanded setup/doctor evidence and keeps every broader gate open.
Return CLEAN only with no Critical or Required finding; otherwise CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if fingerprint, deletion/count admission, authority, or mandatory read-only verification cannot be reproduced.
Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than inventing evidence authority, compatibility, content authority, platform proof, publication, or later-slice behavior.
Return to parent if remediation exceeds the exact HCM-1.4 allowlist or requires HCM-2+.
